title: Confluence:Weapon Modification
description: ✨Modify the indestructible parts of weapons in Confluence: Otherworld
body:
# Allows you Modify the special weapons in Confluence:Otherworld. 

- **Now you can set their durability values in** config/confluence_weaponmod.json ✨
- They can now properly consume durability❤️
- You can add to your modpack as you like✨

![Special weapons can modify durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdfe6ff3d79a3ed04e3a6c75880c8c5cae38e014.jpeg)

- Not supported modify the Whip + Boomerang.💔

![Weapons that cannot be modified](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6805823de42f234056545cd48b8876b4d039839f.png)

- Done✨
